memory.delete_confirm: Delete this memory entry? AI will no longer use it.

session.abort_confirm: Abort the interview? Progress will be lost.

account.delete_confirm: Really delete the account? All data will be erased irreversibly.
account.delete_username_mismatch: Type your username exactly to confirm.

telemetry.delete_confirm: Delete ALL your analytics events irreversibly?

tutor.drop_confirm: End the relationship with this student? Their data stays.

lingua.archive_reading_confirm: Archive this material? It won't appear in the library.

podcasts_admin.delete_confirm: Delete "{{title}}"? The MinIO file will also be removed.
